{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Hearthway
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Hearthway]] is a location where [[Yan Shoumei]] wants bodies buried.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“You were days too slow! I have all the blood I need! I look forward to seeing your bodies buried beneath Hearthway!”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
